If my two approved Deferred-Revenue entries (total $420,111.49 of debits to 240000) are genuinely

No emails, Linear issues, BlackLine review notes, or open exceptions reference this Acme May close.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1. JE-0004 customer payment $64,791.97 (draft, untraceable): Accounts Senior (J. Harrison) + Bookkeeper
     (S. Williams) to locate the receipt or confirm void. Highest priority.
  2. JE-0002 external-audit AP accrual $57,425.46 (draft): J. Harrison to confirm validity vs AP subledger,
     then route to an approver.
  3. Four approved-unposted JEs: a senior with posting authority to post (or reject), AFTER confirming
     impact on the Deferred-Revenue / cash / AR / allowance recons; coordinate with BD3-lock owner M. Chang.
  4. AP+AR control reconcile task: AR control recon (110000) to be completed by E. Moore / me with evidence
     attached to Records Vault; reviewer H. Grant to sign off. My self-"done" status to be reopened.
  5. TB + management package: mine to complete once 1–4 resolve and recons certify; reviewer J. Harrison.
  6. Period-level (lock / certify / BD5 close): M. Sullivan (Controller) to own getting the period unstuck.

I would far rather flag this honestly than guess it is finished. Routing to seniors for direction.
-- Green Spatz
